description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a mix of black and red brick exterior walls, featuring a compact rectangular footprint. The front facade has a dark finish with a wooden door and three windows, while the rear and side walls are primarily red brick with additional windows and a back door. The house includes a fenced backyard with a grassy area, a tree, and outdoor seating, separated by a combination of wooden and black slat fencing. The roof is a mansard style, providing extra living space on the upper floor, and the interior layout is partially visible, showing multiple rooms and hallways. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with varying sizes and placements on each side, and the main entryway is simple, with no porch or overhang.
description: A modern two-story house with black and red brick walls, a mansard roof, asymmetrical windows, and a fenced backyard with greenery and seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing a black facade with a wooden door and three windows, highlighting the main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view displaying red brick walls, a fenced backyard with grass, a tree, and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a red brick wall, a back door, a window, and a clear view of the backyard and fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a black wall, visible backyard, and a tree, emphasizing the enclosed outdoor space.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch or overhang, flanked by windows and set into a dark facade.
